canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>strings</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #0a0a0f; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Web Audio setup
let audioCtx = null;
function initAudio() {
  if (!audioCtx) {
    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  }
}

function playTone(freq, duration = 0.8, volume = 0.15) {
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  
  osc.type = 'triangle';
  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime);
  
  // Add slight vibrato
  const vibrato = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const vibratoGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  vibrato.frequency.value = 5;
  vibratoGain.gain.value = freq * 0.01;
  vibrato.connect(vibratoGain);
  vibratoGain.connect(osc.frequency);
  vibrato.start();
  
  filter.type = 'lowpass';
  filter.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq * 4, audioCtx.currentTime);
  filter.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(freq * 1.5, audioCtx.currentTime + duration * 0.5);
  
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(volume, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.01);
  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
  
  osc.connect(filter);
  filter.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
  vibrato.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
}

// String class with verlet integration
class StringInstrument {
  constructor(x1, y1, x2, y2, segments, baseFreq) {
    this.x1 = x1;
    this.y1 = y1;
    this.x2 = x2;
    this.y2 = y2;
    this.segments = segments;
    this.baseFreq = baseFreq;
    this.points = [];
    this.prevPoints = [];
    this.restLength = Math.hypot(x2 - x1, y2 - y1) / segments;
    this.damping = 0.992;
    this.tension = 0.4;
    this.energy = 0;
    this.lastPluck = 0;
    this.hue = 0;
    
    // Initialize points along the string
    for (let i = 0; i <= segments; i++) {
      const t = i / segments;
      const x = x1 + (x2 - x1) * t;
      const y = y1 + (y2 - y1) * t;
      this.points.push({ x, y });
      this.prevPoints.push({ x, y });
    }
  }
  
  pluck(px, py, force = 1) {
    const now = Date.now();
    if (now - this.lastPluck < 100) return false;
    
    // Find closest point to pluck position
    let minDist = Infinity;
    let pluckIndex = -1;
    
    for (let i = 1; i < this.points.length - 1; i++) {
      const p = this.points[i];
      const dist = Math.hypot(p.x - px, p.y - py);
      if (dist < minDist && dist < 50) {
        minDist = dist;
        pluckIndex = i;
      }
    }
    
    if (pluckIndex > 0) {
      // Displace perpendicular to string
      const dx = this.x2 - this.x1;
      const dy = this.y2 - this.y1;
      const len = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
      const perpX = -dy / len;
      const perpY = dx / len;
      
      // Which side of the string is the mouse?
      const toMouseX = px - this.points[pluckIndex].x;
      const toMouseY = py - this.points[pluckIndex].y;
      const side = perpX * toMouseX + perpY * toMouseY > 0 ? 1 : -1;
      
      // Displace away from mouse
      const displacement = (30 + Math.random() * 20) * force * -side;
      
      // Gaussian displacement centered on pluck point
      for (let i = 1; i < this.points.length - 1; i++) {
        const dist = Math.abs(i - pluckIndex);
        const falloff = Math.exp(-dist * dist / (this.segments * 0.15));
        this.points[i].x += perpX * displacement * falloff;
        this.points[i].y += perpY * displacement * falloff;
      }
      
      this.lastPluck = now;
      this.energy = 1;
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }
  
  update() {
    // Verlet integration
    for (let i = 1; i < this.points.length - 1; i++) {
      const p = this.points[i];
      const prev = this.prevPoints[i];
      
      const vx = (p.x - prev.x) * this.damping;
      const vy = (p.y - prev.y) * this.damping;
      
      prev.x = p.x;
      prev.y = p.y;
      
      p.x += vx;
      p.y += vy;
    }
    
    // Constraint solving (multiple iterations for stability)
    for (let iter = 0; iter < 5; iter++) {
      // Pin endpoints
      this.points[0].x = this.x1;
      this.points[0].y = this.y1;
      this.points[this.points.length - 1].x = this.x2;
      this.points[this.points.length - 1].y = this.y2;
      
      // Distance constraints
      for (let i = 0; i < this.points.length - 1; i++) {
        const p1 = this.points[i];
        const p2 = this.points[i + 1];
        
        const dx = p2.x - p1.x;
        const dy = p2.y - p1.y;
        const dist = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
        const diff = (dist - this.restLength) / dist;
        
        const moveX = dx * diff * this.tension;
        const moveY = dy * diff * this.tension;
        
        if (i > 0) {
          p1.x += moveX * 0.5;
          p1.y += moveY * 0.5;
        }
        if (i < this.points.length - 2) {
          p2.x -= moveX * 0.5;
          p2.y -= moveY * 0.5;
        }
      }
    }
    
    // Calculate energy (for glow intensity)
    let totalVel = 0;
    for (let i = 1; i < this.points.length - 1; i++) {
      const vx = this.points[i].x - this.prevPoints[i].x;
      const vy = this.points[i].y - this.prevPoints[i].y;
      totalVel += Math.hypot(vx, vy);
    }
    this.energy = Math.min(1, totalVel / 10);
  }
  
  draw(ctx) {
    // Glow based on energy
    const glowIntensity = this.energy * 30 + 5;
    
    // Calculate hue based on frequency (lower = more pink, higher = more cyan)
    const freqRatio = (this.baseFreq - 110) / (880 - 110);
    const hue = 300 + freqRatio * 180; // 300 (magenta) to 180 (cyan)
    
    ctx.save();
    ctx.shadowBlur = glowIntensity;
    ctx.shadowColor = `hsl(${hue}, 100%, 60%)`;
    
    // Draw string
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(this.points[0].x, this.points[0].y);
    
    for (let i = 1; i < this.points.length; i++) {
      const p = this.points[i];
      const prev = this.points[i - 1];
      const cpx = (prev.x + p.x) / 2;
      const cpy = (prev.y + p.y) / 2;
      ctx.quadraticCurveTo(prev.x, prev.y, cpx, cpy);
    }
    ctx.lineTo(this.points[this.points.length - 1].x, this.points[this.points.length - 1].y);
    
    const alpha = 0.6 + this.energy * 0.4;
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 100%, ${70 + this.energy * 20}%, ${alpha})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2 + this.energy * 2;
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Draw secondary harmonic ghost
    if (this.energy > 0.1) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(this.points[0].x, this.points[0].y);
      for (let i = 1; i < this.points.length; i++) {
        ctx.lineTo(this.points[i].x, this.points[i].y);
      }
      ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue + 60}, 100%, 80%, ${this.energy * 0.3})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.shadowBlur = glowIntensity * 2;
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    
    ctx.restore();
    
    // Draw mount points
    this.drawMount(ctx, this.x1, this.y1, hue);
    this.drawMount(ctx, this.x2, this.y2, hue);
  }
  
  drawMount(ctx, x, y, hue) {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.shadowBlur = 10;
    ctx.shadowColor = `hsl(${hue}, 100%, 60%)`;
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsl(${hue}, 80%, 40%)`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsl(${hue}, 100%, 70%)`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

// Create strings in a harp-like arrangement
let strings = [];

function createStrings() {
  strings = [];
  
  const centerX = W / 2;
  const centerY = H / 2;
  const numStrings = 12;
  
  // Pentatonic-ish frequencies for pleasant harmonies
  const frequencies = [
    110, 146.83, 164.81, 196, 220,
    293.66, 329.63, 392, 440,
    587.33, 659.25, 783.99
  ];
  
  const startY = H * 0.15;
  const endY = H * 0.85;
  const spreadTop = W * 0.35;
  const spreadBottom = W * 0.5;
  
  for (let i = 0; i < numStrings; i++) {
    const t = i / (numStrings - 1);
    
    // Top anchor (narrower spread)
    const topX = centerX - spreadTop / 2 + spreadTop * t;
    
    // Bottom anchor (wider spread) - creates harp shape
    const bottomX = centerX - spreadBottom / 2 + spreadBottom * t;
    
    // Longer strings = more segments = lower frequency feel
    const segments = 30 + Math.floor((1 - t) * 20);
    
    const str = new StringInstrument(
      topX, startY,
      bottomX, endY,
      segments,
      frequencies[i]
    );
    strings.push(str);
  }
}

createStrings();
window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
  resize();
  createStrings();
});

// Mouse interaction
let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
let lastMouseX = 0, lastMouseY = 0;
let isMouseDown = false;

canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
  initAudio();
  isMouseDown = true;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
  isMouseDown = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  lastMouseX = mouseX;
  lastMouseY = mouseY;
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
  
  if (isMouseDown) {
    // Check for string crossing (plucking)
    const dx = mouseX - lastMouseX;
    const dy = mouseY - lastMouseY;
    const speed = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
    
    if (speed > 3) {
      for (const str of strings) {
        if (str.pluck(mouseX, mouseY, Math.min(speed / 20, 2))) {
          playTone(str.baseFreq, 1.5 + Math.random() * 0.5, 0.12);
        }
      }
    }
  }
});

// Touch support
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  initAudio();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouseX = touch.clientX;
  mouseY = touch.clientY;
  lastMouseX = mouseX;
  lastMouseY = mouseY;
  isMouseDown = true;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  lastMouseX = mouseX;
  lastMouseY = mouseY;
  mouseX = touch.clientX;
  mouseY = touch.clientY;
  
  const dx = mouseX - lastMouseX;
  const dy = mouseY - lastMouseY;
  const speed = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
  
  if (speed > 3) {
    for (const str of strings) {
      if (str.pluck(mouseX, mouseY, Math.min(speed / 20, 2))) {
        playTone(str.baseFreq, 1.5 + Math.random() * 0.5, 0.12);
      }
    }
  }
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
  isMouseDown = false;
});

// Ambient pluck (occasional)
function ambientPluck() {
  if (Math.random() < 0.003) {
    const str = strings[Math.floor(Math.random() * strings.length)];
    const midPoint = Math.floor(str.points.length / 2);
    const p = str.points[midPoint];
    if (str.pluck(p.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10, p.y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10, 0.3)) {
      playTone(str.baseFreq, 2, 0.05);
    }
  }
}

// Background particles (resonance motes)
class Mote {
  constructor() {
    this.reset();
  }
  
  reset() {
    this.x = Math.random() * W;
    this.y = Math.random() * H;
    this.size = Math.random() * 2 + 0.5;
    this.alpha = Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.1;
    this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;
    this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;
    this.hue = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 300 : 180; // pink or cyan
  }
  
  update() {
    // Attracted to vibrating strings
    for (const str of strings) {
      if (str.energy > 0.2) {
        const midIdx = Math.floor(str.points.length / 2);
        const target = str.points[midIdx];
        const dx = target.x - this.x;
        const dy = target.y - this.y;
        const dist = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
        if (dist < 200 && dist > 10) {
          this.vx += (dx / dist) * str.energy * 0.02;
          this.vy += (dy / dist) * str.energy * 0.02;
        }
      }
    }
    
    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;
    this.vx *= 0.99;
    this.vy *= 0.99;
    
    if (this.x < 0 || this.x > W || this.y < 0 || this.y > H) {
      this.reset();
    }
  }
  
  draw(ctx) {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha = this.alpha;
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsl(${this.hue}, 100%, 70%)`;
    ctx.shadowBlur = 5;
    ctx.shadowColor = `hsl(${this.hue}, 100%, 60%)`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

const motes = [];
for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
  motes.push(new Mote());
}

// Frame border decoration
function drawFrame(ctx) {
  const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, W, H);
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(180, 0, 255, 0.1)');
  gradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.1)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255, 0, 128, 0.1)');
  
  ctx.strokeStyle = gradient;
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  
  // Corner accents
  const corner = 40;
  ctx.beginPath();
  // Top left
  ctx.moveTo(corner, 10);
  ctx.lineTo(10, 10);
  ctx.lineTo(10, corner);
  // Top right
  ctx.moveTo(W - corner, 10);
  ctx.lineTo(W - 10, 10);
  ctx.lineTo(W - 10, corner);
  // Bottom left
  ctx.moveTo(corner, H - 10);
  ctx.lineTo(10, H - 10);
  ctx.lineTo(10, H - corner);
  // Bottom right
  ctx.moveTo(W - corner, H - 10);
  ctx.lineTo(W - 10, H - 10);
  ctx.lineTo(W - 10, H - corner);
  ctx.stroke();
}

// Main loop
function animate() {
  // Fade trail
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Update and draw motes
  for (const mote of motes) {
    mote.update();
    mote.draw(ctx);
  }
  
  // Update and draw strings
  for (const str of strings) {
    str.update();
    str.draw(ctx);
  }
  
  ambientPluck();
  drawFrame(ctx);
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
